Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
describe_resource.input_schema.properties.resource_id.desc: Data resource id returned by list_resources.
Connector type for this data resource.
describe_resource.output_schema.properties.columns.descrip: Physical column list for this resource.
describe_resource.output_schema.properties.columns.items.p: Physical column name to use in SQL.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
find_skills.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
find_skills.input_schema.properties.object_type_id.d: Optional object type id used to narrow skill recall.
find_skills.input_schema.properties.instance_identit: Optional object instances that provide execution context for skill recall.
find_skills.input_schema.properties.skill_query.desc: Natural-language description of the skill the user needs.
find_skills.input_schema.properties.top_k.descriptio: Maximum number of matched skills to return.
find_skills.output_schema.properties.message.descrip: Additional recall message or diagnostic note.

Response format is ignored; this tool always returns JSON-compatible tool definitions.
get_action_info.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
get_action_info.input_schema.properties.at_id.descriptio: Action type id returned by search_schema or get_kn_detail.
get_action_info.input_schema.properties._instance_identi: Object instances for which executable action tools should be generated.
get_action_info.output_schema.properties.headers.descrip: Headers required when calling the returned action tools.
Dynamic tool definitions generated for the requested action and instances.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
Concept groups defined in the knowledge network.
get_kn_detail.output_schema.properties.object_types.de: Object types in the knowledge network.
Relation types in the knowledge network.
get_kn_detail.output_schema.properties.action_types.de: Action types in the knowledge network.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.ot_id.descriptio: Object type id for the requested instances.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.query.descriptio: Natural-language explanation of the logic properties to resolve.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties._instance_identi: Instances whose logic property values should be calculated.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.properties.descr: Logic property definitions or identifiers to resolve.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.additional_conte: Optional extra context for resolving ambiguous logic properties.
get_logic_properties_values.input_schema.properties.llm_model.descri: Optional LLM model override for property resolution.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
list_knowledge_networks.input_schema.properties.name_pattern.des: Optional name keyword used to filter knowledge networks.
list_knowledge_networks.input_schema.properties.limit.descriptio: Maximum number of networks to return.
list_knowledge_networks.output_schema.properties.entries.items.p: Business domain that owns this knowledge network.
list_knowledge_networks.output_schema.properties.total_count.des: Total number of matched knowledge networks.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
list_resources.input_schema.properties.limit.descriptio: Maximum number of resources to return.
list_resources.output_schema.properties.entries.items.p: Data resource id to use in run_sql placeholders.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
query_instance_subgraph.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
query_instance_subgraph.input_schema.properties.include_logic_pa: Whether to include logic property parameters in returned nodes.
query_instance_subgraph.input_schema.properties.relation_type_pa: Relation traversal paths used to fetch a subgraph.
Object type steps and optional conditions in this path.
Object type id for this path step.
Filter condition for instances of this object type.
Filter operation supported by the schema.
Where the filter value should be sourced from.
Sort rules for this object type.
Maximum instances for this object type step.
Relation type hops between object types.
Source object type id for the relation.
Target object type id for the relation.
Maximum subgraph results for this path.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.include_logic_pa: Whether to include logic property parameters in returned instances.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.condition.descri: Structured filter condition for object instances.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.condition.proper: Filter operation supported by the schema.
Where the filter value should be sourced from.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.filters.descript: Legacy flat filters. Prefer condition for new calls.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.limit.descriptio: Maximum number of instances to return.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.search_after.des: Cursor returned by the previous page. Use it to fetch the next page.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.offset.descripti: Legacy offset. Prefer search_after when available.
query_object_instance.input_schema.properties.properties.descr: Optional selected property names to return.
query_object_instance.output_schema.properties.datas.descripti: Object instances returned by the query.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
run_sql.input_schema.properties.sql.description: Read-only Trino SQL. Use table placeholders such as {{.resource_id}} and physical column names.
run_sql.input_schema.properties.resource_type.de: Resource source type used to resolve table placeholders.
run_sql.output_schema.properties.warnings.descri: Warnings produced while validating or executing SQL.

Response format: json or toon. Defaults to toon.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.query.descriptio: Natural-language question or keywords to search.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.search_scope.des: Schema search scope. Defaults to all schema types when omitted.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.search_scope.pro: BKN concept group ids used to limit recalled schema.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.max_concepts.des: Maximum number of schema candidates to return.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.schema_brief.des: Whether to return a compact schema payload.
search_schema.input_schema.properties.enable_rerank.de: Whether to rerank recalled relation types.
Whether to include physical column names for object type data properties. Enable this before writing SQL.

execute_action.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
execute_action.input_schema.properties.at_id.descriptio: Action type id returned by search_schema or get_kn_detail.
execute_action.input_schema.properties._instance_identi: Target instances; when empty the action driver scans all instances matching the action condition. Each element must be taken from the _instance_identity field of query_object_instance or query_instance_subgraph, never fabricated.
execute_action.input_schema.properties.dynamic_params.d: Dynamic parameter values for the action (parameters whose value_from=input). First call get_action_info to obtain this action's dynamic_params schema and parameter names, then fill in the real values by name. Each parameter is a separate key; do not concatenate multiple parameter names into one key.
execute_action.output_schema.properties.execution_id.de: Execution id, usable to query execution status and results.
execute_action.output_schema.properties.status.descript: Execution status; usually pending right after submission.

get_action_execution.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
get_action_execution.input_schema.properties.execution_id.des: Action execution id, returned by execute_action.
get_action_execution.output_schema.description: Details of a single action execution, including overall status and per-object results.
get_action_execution.output_schema.properties.total_count.des: Total number of objects involved in this execution.
get_action_execution.output_schema.properties.results.descrip: Per-object execution results (each with status, parameters, result/error, etc.).
Response format: json or toon, default toon (fewer tokens).

list_action_executions.input_schema.properties.kn_id.descriptio: Knowledge network id. Can also be supplied by the X-Kn-ID request header.
Lower bound of start time (Unix milliseconds, optional).
list_action_executions.input_schema.properties.start_time_to.de: Upper bound of start time (Unix milliseconds, optional).
list_action_executions.output_schema.properties.entries.descrip: List of execution records (each with id, action_type_id, status, counts, timestamps and action_type_snapshot).
list_action_executions.output_schema.properties.search_after.de: Pagination cursor; pass this value as search_after in the next request to continue paging.
Response format: json or toon, default toon (fewer tokens).
